title: libpod.conf: add backward compatibility for runtime_path
body:
Add backward compatibility for `runtime_path` that was used by older versions of Podman.
    
The issue was introduced with: 650cf122e1b33f4d8f4426ee1cc1a4bf00c14798
    
If `runtime_path` is specified, it overrides any other configuration and a warning is printed.
    
`runtime_path` should be considered deprecated and will be removed in future.
